meaning: n.剥玉米壳的工作,外壳的去除
examples: The shape system of Chu-Jiu is simple, which is major cereal husking tool.
The test results show that it can work well for high moisture sweet corn husking.
In the northern corner was a rice-husking shed, where the inmates of the inner apartments would occasionally foregather when household necessity demanded.
When Dan Manson was a kid, husking corn was the one chore he would do without complaint.
